symptoms.symptom_name: Near-zero oral intake for several weeks

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Prolonged starvation is the direct driver of protein-energy malnutrition and the refeeding-syndrome risk.

symptoms.symptom_name: Significant unintentional weight loss over months

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Marked involuntary weight loss is a core criterion for severe malnutrition.
Weight loss is non-specific and warrants later malignancy screening, but is explained here by starvation.
Dependent bilateral oedema in a starved patient fits a low plasma oncotic pressure mechanism.
Bilateral leg oedema mandates exclusion of cardiac failure — an important-not-to-miss cause the AI cannot clear remotely.

symptoms.symptom_name: Acute inability to mobilise / profound weakness

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Muscle catabolism and energy depletion cause profound weakness; an acute functional decline is itself a red flag in a frail elder.

symptoms.symptom_name: Ill-fitting dentures with painful inflamed gums (reversible mechanical barrier to eating)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Identifies the reversible mechanical cause of reduced intake — key to management and prognosis.

symptoms.symptom_name: Denies orthopnoea, paroxysmal nocturnal dyspnoea and chest pain

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Absence of orthopnoea/PND lowers the probability of cardiac failure but does not exclude it without examination.

symptoms.symptom_name: Delayed wound healing of minor skin tears

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Impaired wound healing reflects protein depletion and micronutrient deficiency.

symptoms.symptom_name: Visible cachexia — temporal wasting, sunken cheeks, subcutaneous fat and muscle depletion on examination

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Clinician-confirmed fat/muscle depletion is a hallmark of severe malnutrition; the carer's report of 'looks very thin' is suggestive but not a graded exam finding.

symptoms.symptom_name: Flat jugular venous pressure, clear chest, quiet regular heart sounds without S3

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Flat JVP, clear lungs and no gallop point away from a high-hydrostatic (cardiac) cause toward a low-oncotic mechanism — but this is a clinician-only examination, sealed and unavailable to the telehealth AI.

investigation_details.expected_result: Low (hypoalbuminaemia) consistent with severe protein depletion
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: The oncotic cause of the oedema and the severity of protein depletion remain unconfirmed.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Low albumin is the mechanistic link between starvation and third-spacing; requires venepuncture, unavailable via telehealth.

symptoms.symptom_name: Urea/electrolytes, creatinine/eGFR and phosphate/magnesium (refeeding and renal panel)

investigation_details.expected_result: Baseline for renal contribution to oedema and for refeeding-syndrome risk stratification
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: Refeeding cannot be initiated safely and a renal cause of oedema is not excluded.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Baseline and monitored electrolytes are mandatory before and during refeeding.
Borderline-low BP without tachycardia is inconsistent with high-output fluid overload and warns against diuresis; a clinician measurement, sealed.

symptom_clusters.target_diagnosis: Severe protein-energy malnutrition with hypoalbuminaemic oedema
symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Reduced intake + weight loss + visible wasting + low albumin together define severe malnutrition and its oncotic-oedema complication.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Urgent bloods — FBC, U&E, creatinine/eGFR, serum albumin, LFTs, phosphate, magnesium, calcium
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Confirms hypoalbuminaemia, excludes a renal/hepatic cause of oedema and stratifies refeeding-syndrome risk before any nutrition is reintroduced.
Screens for nephrotic-range proteinuria as an alternative cause of hypoalbuminaemic oedema.
Baseline for electrolyte derangement/refeeding risk and cardiac assessment alongside the clinical exam.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Routine outpatient malignancy screening as first-line remote action
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Occult malignancy work-up is a later consideration once the acute decompensation is stabilised; it must not delay urgent in-person assessment.
